# EcoMafola Peace - Full Content
> Handcrafted Pacific treasures from Samoa - Sustainable, ethical, ocean-inspired artisan goods

## Brand Overview

EcoMafola Peace is a social enterprise founded in 2019 that partners with artisan cooperatives in Samoa to create handcrafted, eco-friendly home goods and accessories. We bring traditional South Pacific weaving and carving techniques to conscious consumers worldwide.

**Mission:** To preserve and promote the ancient artistry of the South Pacific while providing sustainable livelihoods for artisan families across Samoa, Fiji, Tonga, and Vanuatu.

**Vision:** A world where traditional craft heritage flourishes, empowering island communities and bringing ocean-inspired beauty to homes globally.

---

## Key Statistics (2026)

| Metric | Value | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| Artisan Partners | 240+ | Families across Samoa, Fiji, Tonga & Vanuatu |
| Paid to Artisans | $2.4M | Direct fair-trade payments since 2019 |
| Women-led Cooperatives | 18 | Weaving and craft cooperatives |
| Sustainable Materials | 94% | Certified eco-sourced raw materials |
| Premium Paid | 40% | Above market rates to artisan families |
| US Delivery | 7-12 days | Free shipping on all orders |
| Customer Rating | 4.9/5 | From verified buyers |

---

## Our Story

EcoMafola Peace was founded on the belief that the ancient artistry of the South Pacific—from the rhythmic weaving of Samoan grass to the intricate carving of mother-of-pearl—deserves a global stage. We don't just sell objects; we share a legacy.

We partner directly with family cooperatives across Samoa, Fiji, and the wider Polynesian triangle. These are communities where the *mafola* spirit—meaning to flourish and spread out—is woven into every basket and carved into every shell.

When you bring an EcoMafola piece into your home, you're not just choosing sustainable decor. You're supporting the education of island youth, the preservation of non-material cultural heritage, and a thousand-year-old story of ocean-borne wisdom.

### The Mafola Artisan Fund
Every purchase directly fuels the Mafola Artisan Fund, providing health and micro-finance resources to over 240 artisan families across the Pacific islands.

---

## Sustainability Commitment

- **100% Natural Materials:** Coconut shell, pandanus grass, natural shells, coconut coir
- **Zero-Waste Production:** Every part of the material is used
- **Fair Trade Partnerships:** 40% above market rates paid to artisans
- **Carbon-Neutral Shipping:** Sea freight for bulk transport
- **Cultural Preservation:** Supporting traditional craft techniques passed down through generations

---

## Shipping & Returns

- **Free US Shipping:** On all orders over $50
- **Delivery Time:** 7-12 business days
- **Processing:** 1-3 business days
- **Returns:** 30-day return policy
- **Tracking:** Available for all orders at /track

---

## Contact Information

- **Email:** hello@ecomafola.com
- **Location:** Apia, Samoa & Sydney, Australia
- **Response Time:** Within 24 hours
- **Support Hours:** Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm AEST

---

## Brand Values

🌿 **Eco-friendly and sustainable** - All materials are natural and ethically sourced
🤲 **Handmade by skilled artisans** - Traditional techniques preserved through generations
🌊 **Ocean-inspired designs** - Celebrating the beauty of the South Pacific
♻️ **Zero-waste production** - Respect for the environment in every step
🤝 **Fair trade partnerships** - Empowering artisan families and communities
